summary: Material Request Workflow Bug Fix - VERIFIED. The Planning Board's Requests tab now correctly shows site requests and allows approve/reject actions. Previously returned 404 because endpoints didn't exist.

issues: Console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key' on /planning-board - minor React key issue

backend_tests.GET /api/material-requests: PASS - Returns 200 with list of material requests
backend_tests.GET /api/labour-expenses: PASS - Returns 200 with list of labour expenses
backend_tests.PATCH /api/material-requests/{id}/planni: PASS - Returns 200, status changes to planning_approved
PASS - Returns 200, status changes to rejected
backend_tests.POST /api/site-engineer/material-request: PASS - Site engineer can create request with status=requested

frontend_tests.planning_demo_login: PASS - Planning user can login via Demo Access
frontend_tests.requests_tab_visible: PASS - Requests tab accessible with data-testid='tab-requests'
frontend_tests.material_request_display: PASS - Shows material name, quantity, project name
frontend_tests.approve_button_visible: PASS - Green Approve button visible and clickable
frontend_tests.reject_button_visible: PASS - Red Reject button visible and clickable
frontend_tests.approve_action_works: PASS - Clicking Approve shows 'Approved' toast notification

workflow_verified.step_1: Site Engineer creates material request → status: requested ✓
workflow_verified.step_2: Planning sees request in Requests tab → Site Requests (1) ✓
workflow_verified.step_5: Planning can also reject → status: rejected ✓

critical_code_review_comments: New endpoints correctly added in /app/backend/routes/site_ops.py lines 930-1095
GET /api/material-requests and GET /api/labour-expenses properly filter by status query param
PATCH planning-action endpoints correctly update status and create notifications
Frontend PlanningBoard.jsx correctly calls the new API endpoints
Minor: React key warning on /planning-board page should be investigated

success_rate.backend: 100% (14/14 passed, 4 skipped due to state dependencies)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed projects and material requests during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Material request workflow fully tested and working. New endpoints in site_ops.py: GET /api/material-requests, GET /api/labour-expenses, PATCH /api/material-requests/{id}/planning-action, PATCH /api/labour-expenses/{id}/planning-action. Site engineer must be ASSIGNED to a project before creating material requests. Use engineer@constructionos.com for demo testing. Planning Board route is /planning-board (not /planning).

bug_verification.original_issue: Planning Board Requests tab showed 0 requests because /api/material-requests and /api/labour-expenses returned 404
bug_verification.fix_verification: Endpoints now return 200 with proper data, UI shows pending requests with Approve/Reject buttons
